ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "permalink" TEXT /* Permalink for the organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "homepage_url" TEXT /* Homepage URL of the organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the organization */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the organization is located */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the organization is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region name for the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is based */,
  "founded_at" TEXT /* Date when the organization was founded */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to social media profiles */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the organization */,
  "annual_revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the organization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the organization's profile was last updated */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the organization's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the location */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code for the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region name for the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for the location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foundations" (
  "foundation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the foundation record */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization */,
  "founded_at" TEXT /* Date the organization was founded */,
  "founder_names" TEXT /* Names of the founders */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Initial funding amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foundation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foundations_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations_categories" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category assigned to the organization */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is the primary category for the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the organization */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the organization was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the organization */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the organization */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of organizations in the specified region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the distribution record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_distributions_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  "reason_for_update" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_updates_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)
